name: Permutações
description: Calcule as permutações de n itens tomados r de cada vez.
seo_description: Calcule as permutações de n itens tomados r de cada vez. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantânea. Obtenha resultados instantaneos com explicacao.
example_label: Find the number of permutations when selecting 3 items from 8 distinct items.
result_context: The permutations {perm} count the number of ways to arrange r items from n when order matters.
mistakes: Using combinations formula instead of permutations
Allowing r > n which gives invalid results
Confusing when order matters vs doesn't matter
